theme: grid battery arbitrage against seeded prices
title: Ridgeline Grid: Aging-Aware Battery Arbitrage
strategies: do nothing: never charge or discharge, zero profit, zero risk (reproduces the evaluator's do-nothing reference)

fixed-margin threshold trader: buy/sell at full power whenever price crosses a flat +/-8% band around the series mean, ignoring the instance's own efficiency and aging-cost fields and never shallow-cycling

breakeven-aware peak/valley exchange decomposition: compute the true marginal breakeven spread from eta_c/eta_d/aging_coeff/degradation_price, keep only valley-to-peak legs that clear it, and ladder execution across a short window around each extremum to keep discharges shallow

global capacity-budgeted planning: rank all surviving legs by expected net value and solve a small knapsack/LP over the whole horizon to allocate capacity optimally across every seeded swing, discounting for compounding aging
